mapper.select: SELECT WIRE_PROD_TITLE, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_CONT WHERE WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd}

SELECT WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ, WIRE_PROD_CD, WIRE_PROD_CORP, WIRE_PROD_NAME, WIRE_PROD_PC_SBST FROM NMCP_WIRE_PROD_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND WIRE_PROD_SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND WIRE_PROD_CD = #{wireProdCd} AND WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ = #{wireProdDtlSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL((MAX(TO_NUMBER(COUNSEL_SEQ))+1),1)AS COUNSEL_SEQ FROM NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL
INSERT INTO NMCP_WIRE_COUNSEL ( COUNSEL_SEQ ,WIRE_PROD_DTL_SEQ ,COUNSEL_NM ,COUNSEL_CTN ,COUNSEL_MEMO ,COUNSEL_REG_DT ,COUNSEL_STATUS ,PRO_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{counselSeq}, #{wireProdDtlSeq}, #{counselNm}, #{counselCtn}, #{counselMemo}, SYSDATE, 'I', '1' )
